# UC-23.1.8 · Form Abandonment and Field-Level Drop-Off

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Platform &middot; **Type:** Business &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We spot when someone begins answering questions on an enrollment or inquiry screen but leaves before sending it, and which blanks lined up with that exit—so teams reorder fields and shorten wording instead of arguing from instinct alone.*

---

## Description

Splunk aggregates browser-side field telemetry—focus, blur, input sequences, validation failures, refill counts after mistakes, staged steps in progressive layouts, and unload-without-success signals—from Google Tag Manager dataLayer pushes, Adobe Launch rule firings forwarded through HTTP Event Collector, Hotjar Form Analytics exports, FullStory custom-event extracts, HubSpot webhook payloads, Marketo REST activity pulls, GA4 forwarded parameters, and comparable intake stacks (Adobe AEM Adaptive Forms JSON posts, Typeform webhook bodies). Normalisation produces unified `form_id`, `field_name`, ordinal position, harmonised `event_type`, stitched anonymous identifiers, dwell milliseconds per control, correction/refocus counters as hesitation proxies, placement context where encoded (embedded iframe versus modal versus sticky footer), and device plus viewport bands so Product and Growth teams see where enquiries stall—not merely page-level funnel ratios covered elsewhere.

## Value

Growth and demand-generation owners recover pipeline yield from traffic already reaching gated screens by exposing which mandatory blanks trigger retries and exits before CRM receipt; UX research receives ranked friction pairs backed by dwell-time tails instead of anecdotal heatmaps alone; Revenue Operations attaches dollar bands via Splunk lookups tied to historical close rates per intake programme—making plain-language ROI cases for shortening HIPAA-aware healthcare intake, FINRA-aligned brokerage forms, scholarship widgets on `.edu` domains, insurance-quote paths, or SaaS trial gates without waiting on quarterly mart rebuilds.

## Implementation

Instrument consent-aware JS collectors emitting canonical keys (`event_type`, `form_id`, `field_name`, `field_index`, `session_id`, `time_on_field_ms`, `validation_error`, `correction_count`, `form_step`, `viewport_width`, `device_type`) toward Splunk HEC; mirror Marketo OAuth extracts plus HubSpot webhook deliveries into the same index family; schedule nightly KV uploads for economics lookups; attach page-unload handlers via `sendBeacon` only after GDPR/CCPA-consented cohorts pass your CMP gate.

## Evidence

Dashboard Studio workbook FormFrictionOverview archived weekly plus alert artifact URLs routed to Slack growth-alerts channel.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Synthetic replay pushes sequential JSON rows where session sess_demo executes form_start on field_first, spends eighteen seconds with validation errors on phone_local, then terminates via page_unload without form_submit_success—Splunk ranks phone_local toward the top of friction_rank versus cohort baseline.

### Negative scenario

Batch CRM imports mistakenly tagged as sourcetype web:form_event but lacking interactive dwell signatures—pipeline drops them via ingestion macro requiring presence of session_id plus sequential timestamps spaced under fifteen minutes.

## Detailed Implementation

### Prerequisites
- Heavy Forwarder or Splunk Cloud HTTP Event Collector endpoints exposing HTTPS listeners with TLS profiles acceptable to enterprise proxies; tokens scoped to index=business or equivalent plus optional dedicated intake_test partition.
- Consent Management Platform callbacks respected—suppress pre-consent beacon floods before Splunk indexes labeled experiments.
- CSV/KV artefacts form_to_lead_value.csv (columns form_id, avg_lead_value_usd, lead_close_rate, customer_ltv_band), form_step_map.csv (maps wizard ordinal labels), field_pii_class.csv tagging controls requiring KV_MODE=none pathways.
- Python worker authorised for Marketo OAuth client_credentials grants hitting identity endpoints plus incremental pulls filtered on LastUpdated watermark.
- Secrets vault storing HubSpot app tokens, Marketo secrets, AWS keys for FullStory buckets outside repositories.

### Step 1 — Configure instrumentation plus ingestion paths
(A) Browser beacon JSON toward Splunk HTTP Event Collector `/services/collector/event` using consistent `_time` from performance.now deltas merged into UTC epoch milliseconds; typical Google Tag Manager dataLayer enqueue resembles {"event":"form_field_blur","form_id":"contact_us_v2","field_name":"phone_number","field_index":4,"field_type":"tel","time_on_field_ms":12450,"validation_error":"Invalid format","correction_count":2,"session_id":"sess_a731","anonymous_id":"anon_884"}. Bind unload handlers calling navigator.sendBeacon only after CMP grants analytics storage.
(B) Google Tag Manager Server-Side container publishes enriched hits (often tagged ClientNames matching GA4 or Meta CAPI bridges) toward Cloud Run relay POSTing JSON with Authorization: Splunk <hec-token>; preserve container diagnostics headers so cohort splits survive audits.
(C) Hotjar Form Analytics CSV or JSON batches land hourly via SFTP; monitored tail forwards sourcetype hotjar:form_export where rows resemble {"form_id":"trial_signup","field":"annual_revenue","drop_off_rate":0.34,"refill_rate":0.18,"avg_time_seconds":45.2}. Map refill_rate into correction_count proxies.
(D) FullStory batch extracts staged on Amazon S3 ingest through Splunk Add-on for AWS ([Splunkbase 1876](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/1876)); retain FS URL drillbacks as lookup columns.
(E) HubSpot Forms Webhooks v2 POST bodies parse nested field arrays plus portal/form identifiers into sourcetype hubspot:form_webhook.
(F) Marketo heavy tier uses Splunk DB Connect JDBC plus REST wrappers referencing `/rest/v1/leads.json` with activity joins—persist munchkin-derived visitor keys alongside Splunk sessions.
Sample props.conf stanza:
[web:form_event]
KV_MODE = json
INDEXED_EXTRACTIONS = json
SHOULD_LINEMERGE = false
LINE_BREAKER = ([\r\n]+)
TRUNCATE = 1048576
TIMESTAMP_FIELDS = epoch_ts
TIME_PREFIX = "epoch_ts"
TIME_FORMAT = %s.%3N
MAX_TIMESTAMP_LOOKAHEAD = 24
FIELDALIAS-session_alias = visitorGuid AS anonymous_id
FullStory JSON excerpt ingested beside beacon streams (shape illustrative): {"event":{"eventName":"field_blur","properties":{"field":"mobile_phone","duration_ms":8332}}}.
For raw PII-bearing previews set KV_MODE=none plus transforms stripping digits:
SEDCMD-strip_phone = s/\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}/###-##-####/g
Stage hashed emails via eval email_sha256=sha256(lower(trim(work_email))) before indexing joins.
Redaction parity: honour Hotjar data-hj-suppress, FullStory fs-exclude classes, Adobe Launch IsValueRedacted flags, Google Tag Manager consent-mode v2 defaults—Splunk ingestion never reverses suppressed payloads.
### Step 2 — SPL macros plus KV lookups
Promote canonical SPL fragments into macros form_norm_begin for coalesce-heavy eval chains and attach lookups:
| lookup form_to_lead_value.csv form_id OUTPUT avg_lead_value_usd lead_close_rate customer_ltv_band
| lookup field_pii_class.csv field_name OUTPUT sensitivity_band
KV Store collections optionally maintain hashed identifiers when GDPR Article 25 minimisation mandates ephemeral joins.
Schedule nightly KV replication jobs validating checksum drift versus Snowflake CRM extracts.
### Step 3 — Validation cadence versus vendor consoles
Weekly reconcile Splunk starters versus HubSpot Forms Performance totals filtered identical portals.
Contrast validation-error spikes against Hotjar Form Analytics dashboards plus FullStory Form Insights slices referencing identical publish ids.
Adobe Analytics practitioners compare Splunk stitched sequences against Workspace Form Detail metrics after clearing Virtual Report Suite filters.
GA4 explorers validate generate_lead counts versus Splunk unified_event taxonomy via BigQuery mirrored tables.
Marketo admins confirm REST-exported submit totals versus Splunk counts within SLA noting Bulk Export latency envelopes.
Document variance notebooks capturing CMP suppression versus analytics suites.
### Step 4 — Operational routing plus cadence
Slack channel growth-friction receives alerts when start_to_submit_pct drops more than ten percentage points week-over-week using sidetable comparisons.
Microsoft Teams webhook mirrors executive summaries plus Splunk dashboard PNG renders.
ServiceNow incidents auto-assign UX Operations queue when validation_error_rate exceeds twenty-five percent on any monitored control while blur denominators remain statistically stable.
Weekly emailed CSV summarises recoverable dollars alongside friction_rank leaderboard.
Daily differential alert compares Splunk abandonment cadence versus Salesforce State of Marketing cited norms (~38 percent B2B average completion expectation) contextualising spikes.
### Step 5 — Troubleshooting modes
1. GDPR consent-mode v2 plus Safari Intelligent Tracking Prevention throttle analytics tags—Safari-heavy cohorts lose early blur telemetry yet occasionally retain completion posts, flattering abandonment narratives until segmentation isolates affected browsers.
2. Botnets scripted through headless Chromium submit instantly without dwell variance—flag sessions where combined time_on_field_ms stays below two hundred milliseconds with correction_count zero for exclusion macros.
3. Browser autofill bulk-populates Street Address Line Two plus Postal Code faster than focus timers capture—dwell collapses toward zero despite legitimate completions.
4. Progressive profiling renders intentional exits after informational steps distinct from revenue-critical abandonment—partition streams using form_step quartiles plus lookup-defined funnel archetypes.
5. Conditional visibility reveals salary-range widgets after unrelated toggles record focus-before-visible anomalies producing phantom friction scores absent screenshot corroboration.
6. Experiment wrappers such as Optimizely or AB Tasty inject delays exceeding hundreds of milliseconds—validation handlers occasionally attach late producing phantom submit_attempt minus submit_success discrepancies unrelated to copy edits.
7. JavaScript exceptions inside validator bundles silence submit bindings until reload—Splunk abandonment climbs while browser-console telemetry simultaneously spikes requiring correlation indexes.
8. Users abandon during asynchronous server-side rejection loops triggered after pressing submit—Splunk sequences resemble dropout despite adequate typing durations.
9. Container publication swaps tagging schemas mid-week—Tuesday jumps trace instrumentation hashes rather than shopper sentiment until container-version filters isolate cohorts.
10. Cookie-banner sequencing admits analytics submissions without preceding documented form_start heartbeat—orphaned completions distort funnel denominators unless CMP-suppressed sessions carry synthetic starters.
11. Mobile Safari autofocus zoom reshuffles viewport geometry generating duplicated focus churn mistaken for renewed engagement intensity.
12. Successful submissions followed immediately by browser-back navigation replay partially hydrated sessions causing duplicated starters versus singleton completions skewing ratios.
13. Dual-deployment migrations leave Adobe Launch plus Google Tag Manager simultaneously firing duplicated identifiers until dedupe macros keyed on event_id plus sequence counters purge overlaps.
14. HubSpot REST export throttling near one hundred requests per ten-second portal slices drops webhook echoes resembling abandonment troughs until HubSpot operational dashboards corroborate ingestion gaps.
15. Corporate NAT QA testers repetitively hammer staging clones sharing IP prefixes—exclude curated CIDR lists feeding Splunk lookups.
16. Embedded iframe placements diverge materially from modal overlays versus sticky footer anchors—failure to honour encoded placement contexts mixes incomparable behavioural densities.

## SPL

```spl
index=business earliest=-30d@d latest=now
(sourcetype="web:form_event" OR sourcetype="hec:gtm_ss" OR sourcetype="hotjar:form_export" OR sourcetype="fullstory:custom_event" OR sourcetype="hubspot:form_webhook" OR sourcetype="marketo:activity" OR sourcetype="analytics:ga4_forward")
| eval ingest_vendor=case(
    sourcetype="web:form_event","gtm_adobe_launch",
    sourcetype="hec:gtm_ss","gtm_server",
    sourcetype="hotjar:form_export","hotjar",
    sourcetype="fullstory:custom_event","fullstory",
    sourcetype="hubspot:form_webhook","hubspot",
    sourcetype="marketo:activity","marketo",
    sourcetype="analytics:ga4_forward","ga4",
    1=1,"unknown")
| eval form_id=lower(trim(coalesce(form_id,formId,form_name,aem_form_id,typeform_form_id,"unknown")))
| eval field_name=lower(trim(coalesce(field_name,fieldName,field,fhs_field,"")))
| eval field_index=tonumber(coalesce(field_index,field_position,field_seq,"0"))
| eval session_id=coalesce(session_id,sessionId,fs_session,munchkin_visit_id,hutk_cluster,"")
| eval anonymous_id=coalesce(anonymous_id,visitor_id,vid,pseudonymous_id,"")
| eval event_type=lower(trim(coalesce(event_type,eventName,activity_type,"")))
| eval time_on_field_ms=tonumber(coalesce(time_on_field_ms,dwell_ms,time_ms,if(isnum(avg_time_seconds),avg_time_seconds*1000,null),"0"))
| eval validation_error=coalesce(validation_error,error_message,error_msg,"")
| eval correction_count=tonumber(coalesce(correction_count,if(isnum(refill_rate),refill_rate*100,null),"0"))
| eval form_step=coalesce(form_step,step_index,multi_page_step,"1")
| eval device_type=lower(trim(coalesce(device_type,device_category,"desktop")))
| eval viewport_width=tonumber(coalesce(viewport_width,viewport_px,"1280"))
| eval viewport_width_band=case(viewport_width<600,"mobile",viewport_width<1024,"tablet",1=1,"desktop_wide")
| eval unified_event=case(
    match(event_type,"focus"),"field_focus",
    match(event_type,"blur"),"field_blur",
    match(event_type,"input"),"field_input",
    match(event_type,"change"),"field_change",
    match(event_type,"validation"),"field_validation_error",
    match(event_type,"correction"),"field_correction",
    match(event_type,"skip"),"field_skip",
    match(event_type,"start"),"form_start",
    match(event_type,"attempt"),"form_submit_attempt",
    match(event_type,"success"),"form_submit_success",
    match(event_type,"failure"),"form_submit_failure_server_side",
    match(event_type,"unload"),"page_unload",
    match(event_type,"abandon"),"form_abandon",
    1=1,event_type)
| where session_id!=""
| sort 0 session_id _time
| join type=left session_id [
    search index=business earliest=-30d@d latest=now
      (sourcetype="web:form_event" OR sourcetype="hec:gtm_ss" OR sourcetype="hotjar:form_export" OR sourcetype="fullstory:custom_event" OR sourcetype="hubspot:form_webhook" OR sourcetype="marketo:activity" OR sourcetype="analytics:ga4_forward")
    | eval session_id=coalesce(session_id,sessionId,fs_session,munchkin_visit_id,hutk_cluster,"")
    | eval event_type=lower(trim(coalesce(event_type,eventName,activity_type,"")))
    | eval unified_event=case(
        match(event_type,"focus"),"field_focus",
        match(event_type,"blur"),"field_blur",
        match(event_type,"input"),"field_input",
        match(event_type,"change"),"field_change",
        match(event_type,"validation"),"field_validation_error",
        match(event_type,"correction"),"field_correction",
        match(event_type,"skip"),"field_skip",
        match(event_type,"start"),"form_start",
        match(event_type,"attempt"),"form_submit_attempt",
        match(event_type,"success"),"form_submit_success",
        match(event_type,"failure"),"form_submit_failure_server_side",
        match(event_type,"unload"),"page_unload",
        match(event_type,"abandon"),"form_abandon",
        1=1,event_type)
    | where session_id!=""
    | sort 0 session_id _time
    | transaction session_id maxspan=1800
    | eval ue_join=mvjoin(unified_event," ")
    | eval session_outcome=case(match(ue_join,"form_submit_success"),"submitted",match(ue_join,"form_start"),"unconverted",1=1,"other")
    | eval abandonment_field=if(session_outcome=="unconverted" AND mvcount(field_name)>0,mvindex(field_name,mvcount(field_name)-1),null())
    | fields session_id session_outcome abandonment_field ue_join
]
| streamstats current=t window=20 global=f list(field_name) as field_path list(unified_event) as event_path by session_id
| eval evt_concat=mvjoin(event_path," ")
| eval validation_errors=if(unified_event=="field_validation_error",1,0)
| eval blur_evt=if(unified_event=="field_blur",1,0)
| stats sum(validation_errors) as validation_errors sum(blur_evt) as blur_count perc50(time_on_field_ms) as p50_ms perc95(time_on_field_ms) as p95_ms avg(correction_count) as avg_corrections dc(session_id) as distinct_sessions_touching_field sum(eval(if(correction_count>2,1,0))) as high_friction_sessions by form_id field_name ingest_vendor device_type viewport_width_band
| eval validation_error_rate=if(blur_count>0,round(100*validation_errors/blur_count,2),null())
| join type=left form_id [
    search index=business earliest=-30d@d latest=now
      (sourcetype="web:form_event" OR sourcetype="hec:gtm_ss" OR sourcetype="hotjar:form_export" OR sourcetype="fullstory:custom_event" OR sourcetype="hubspot:form_webhook" OR sourcetype="marketo:activity" OR sourcetype="analytics:ga4_forward")
    | eval form_id=lower(trim(coalesce(form_id,formId,form_name,"unknown")))
    | eval session_id=coalesce(session_id,sessionId,"")
    | eval event_type=lower(trim(coalesce(event_type,eventName,"")))
    | eval unified_event=case(match(event_type,"start"),"form_start",match(event_type,"attempt"),"form_submit_attempt",match(event_type,"success"),"form_submit_success",match(event_type,"unload"),"page_unload",1=1,event_type)
    | stats dc(eval(if(unified_event=="form_start",session_id,null()))) as starters dc(eval(if(unified_event=="form_submit_attempt",session_id,null()))) as attempters dc(eval(if(unified_event=="form_submit_success",session_id,null()))) as completers by form_id
    | eval start_to_submit_pct=if(starters>0,round(100*completers/starters,2),null())
    | eval submit_to_success_pct=if(attempters>0,round(100*completers/attempters,2),null())
]
| lookup form_to_lead_value.csv form_id OUTPUT avg_lead_value_usd lead_close_rate customer_ltv_band
| eval avg_lead_value_usd=coalesce(tonumber(avg_lead_value_usd),125)
| eval lead_close_rate=coalesce(tonumber(lead_close_rate),0.08)
| eval customer_ltv_band=coalesce(tonumber(customer_ltv_band),1.0)
| eval revenue_recoverable=round((starters-completers)*avg_lead_value_usd*lead_close_rate*customer_ltv_band,2)
| where start_to_submit_pct<40 OR validation_error_rate>15 OR p95_ms>60000 OR (avg_corrections>1.5 AND high_friction_sessions>50)
| sort -validation_errors
| streamstats current=t count as friction_rank
| sort form_id field_name -validation_error_rate
| table form_id field_name ingest_vendor device_type viewport_width_band starters completers attempters start_to_submit_pct submit_to_success_pct validation_error_rate p50_ms p95_ms avg_corrections high_friction_sessions revenue_recoverable friction_rank distinct_sessions_touching_field
| head 400
```

## Visualization

Dashboard Studio trellis heatmap (`splunk.matrix`) of form × field with validation-error hue; funnel tiles (`splunk.singlevalue`) for starters versus completers plus recoverable dollars row; scatter (`splunk.scatter`) for dwell-time p95 versus correction averages; paired drilldown into Session Replay URLs stored as external links.

## Known False Positives

Instrumentation parity drift—not seasonal whims—is what bites: when Safari Intelligent Tracking Prevention blocks first-party scripts until late interaction, early blur timestamps disappear while submit receipts still arrive, so abandonment math exaggerates curiosity exits on Apple-heavy cohorts despite unchanged creative assets. Conditional-display logic may reveal hidden salary-range controls after unrelated radio picks; Splunk logs focus events before respondents perceive those widgets, falsely blaming invisible blanks until DOM snapshots corroborate visibility windows.
